name: NZ Automotive Investments Limited
summary: NZ Automotive Investments Limited, through its subsidiaries, operates in the automotive retail and vehicle finance businesses in New Zealand. It sells used vehicles through 12 car dealerships operated under the 2 Cheap Cars brand in New Zealand; and offers secured car loans under the NZ Motor Finance brand. The company was formerly known as 2CC Holdings Limited and changed its name to NZ Automotive Investments Limited in November 2020. NZ Automotive Investments Limited was incorporated in 2016 and is headquartered in Mt Wellington, New Zealand.
